texto: Forgiveness is the ocean that already surrounds us when we launch our prayers of repentance to God. We do not manufacture the ocean by our repentance
autor: we sail in the peace its boundless waters provide.
explicacao: Citação de we sail in the peace its boundless waters provide. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Forgiveness is the ocean that already surrounds us when we launch our prayers of repentance to Go…” articula reflexao, bryan-chapell, ocean em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
